ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Unique postal code identifier */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough in which the postal code is located */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood associated with the postal code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude coordinate */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Boundary coordinates of the postal code in a structured format */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Area size of the postal code in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the postal code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Area size of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "council_members" INTEGER /* Number of council members representing the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the borough */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information for the neighborhood in a structured format */,
  "history" TEXT /* Brief history of the neighborhood */,
  "zoning_regulations" TEXT /* Zoning regulations applicable to the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age groups in the neighborhood */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnic groups in the neighborhood */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of income levels in the neighborhood */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the neighborhood population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the neighborhood */,
  "residential" REAL /* Percentage of land used for residential purposes */,
  "commercial" REAL /* Percentage of land used for commercial purposes */,
  "industrial" REAL /* Percentage of land used for industrial purposes */,
  "recreational" REAL /* Percentage of land used for recreational purposes */,
  "transportation" REAL /* Percentage of land used for transportation purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_use_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban plan */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the urban planning initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the urban plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the urban plan */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the urban plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the urban plan (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_plans_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., urban planning, transportation, parks and recreation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., neighborhood data, urban plan, land use map) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the census data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the neighborhood */,
  "income" REAL /* Average household income in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_data" (
  "real_estate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the real estate data */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average property price in the neighborhood */,
  "rentals" INTEGER /* Number of rental properties in the neighborhood */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of property sales in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("real_estate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)
